response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo has a solid 17-year engineering career with genuine breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and data systems, plus meaningful entrepreneurial experience as a founder. However, the role is a Director-level individual contributor requiring demonstrated AI strategy leadership, the ability to advise enterprise customers on cloud and AI adoption, and recognized external expertise in AI — none of which the resume evidences. The candidate's AI involvement is recent, tooling-scoped (MCP generators, agentic workflow support), and does not rise to the strategic advisory or thought-leadership level the role demands. The gap between current Staff/Senior IC positioning and the Principal/Director seniority required is significant.
strengths: 17+ years of diverse, hands-on engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded systems, data integration, and high-throughput infrastructure, satisfying the 15-year minimum.
Active founder of GISCollective (2016–present), demonstrating entrepreneurial initiative within a technical domain — a preferred qualification explicitly listed in the job description.
Current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework work, showing recent, practical engagement with agentic AI tooling aligned to the role's technology focus.
concerns: No evidence of Director-level individual contributor scope: the resume reflects Staff/Senior IC roles with no track record of advising strategic enterprise customers or shaping org-wide technical strategy.

AI expertise is recent and narrowly tooling-focused (MCP generators, agentic scaffolding) rather than the deep, recognized AI/ML leadership — with shipped AI products or platforms at scale — the role explicitly prioritizes.
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and limited cloud platform depth (one AWS CDK engagement); both are preferred qualifications the candidate does not satisfy.
